subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the fragrances of God! The sword of God is utterance and exposition, proof and evidence, and the reality of true knowledge—not steel [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب بنفحات الله سیف الهی نطق و بیانست و حجت و برهان و حقیقت عرفان نه آهن
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @the power of words; of speech
